hooks.command: INPUT="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"; if echo "$INPUT" | grep -q 'marketplace.json'; then echo '⚠ ATTENZIONE: Modifica a marketplace.json — verificare schema e struttura dopo edit' >&2; fi

INPUT="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"; FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | grep -oP '"file_path"\s*:\s*"\K[^"]+' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -q 'SKILL.md$'; then if [ -f "$FILE" ]; then VIOLATIONS=$(grep -ciP '\byou\b|\byour\b|\byou.re\b|\byourself\b' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ "$VIOLATIONS" -gt 0 ]; then echo "STYLE: $VIOLATIONS possibili violazioni you/your in $FILE — verificare forma imperativa" >&2; fi; WORDS=$(wc -w < "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ "$WORDS" -gt 3500 ]; then echo "SIZE: $WORDS parole in $FILE — target 1500-2000, considerare spostamento in references/" >&2; fi; fi; fi
